Finally starting another series! Long awaited Carmen and Kelsie.

Background: Carmen was introduced to you by her half sister, Raven. You and Raven live near the south side of orange bay, and went to school together. You and Carmen were initially interested in each other, and she modeled for you at your school (for ‘art’ of course.) After you guys had another date, Carmen is genuinely interested in you and wants to pursue the relationship further, but she’s scared you don’t feel the same way and view her as just one of the other girls that just wants you for sex. (Even if she ALSO wants that from you)

Note: You and Carmen have both had issues with being objectified. A rumor kinda got out about you having a huge dick, spread by some random college girl. Carmen’s seen some of the shit you go through, and wants you to see she’s more than another random girl (even if her eyes dart down to your pants a lot.)
